notes: Model numbers: 3941R, 3941R2 (with premium HDMI cable bundle), 3941X (international variant). Discontinued as of 2024. Supports HDR10, HDR10+, and HLG — Dolby Vision is NOT supported. Audio: Dolby Atmos passthrough via Dolby Digital Plus over HDMI, DTS Digital Surround passthrough, digital stereo. Wi-Fi: 802.11ac dual-band (2.4/5 GHz). Wired Ethernet requires separately purchased Micro USB-to-Ethernet adapter. No built-in Ethernet port. HDMI version confirmed as 2.0 (per retailer spec sheets citing Roku data); HDCP 2.2 required on TV for 4K HDR playback. Power spec 5V 1A confirmed via Roku community power guide and third-party adapter listings.

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: HDMI 2.0, HDCP 2.2; supports up to 4K/60fps, HDR10, HDR10+, HLG. Dolby Vision is NOT supported.

ports.name: Power
ports.note: Micro USB power input; 5V 1A, ~2.5W typical during 4K streaming. Can be powered from TV USB port or included AC adapter.
